subcodes.first_line: Although the dark clouds of oppression have veiled the countenance of justice, yet the Sun of Revelation hath dawned from the horizon of divine favor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگرچه غمام تیره ظلم وجه عدل را ستر نموده ولکن آفتاب ظهور از مشرق عنایت ظاهر و
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @love of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
